assets.name: Ukrhydroenergo (Hydro Portfolio)
assets.description: State hydro-power company operating Dnipro cascade dams. Post-war privatisation candidate with strong revenue base. Trust anchor stake preserves public interest while enabling private co-investment.

assets.name: Ukrzaliznytsia (Rail Network)
assets.description: National railway operator. Wartime proven backbone of civilian evacuation and military logistics. Post-war freight revenue recovery underpins equity value. European gauge conversion creates EU market access.

assets.name: Odesa & Mykolaiv Port Complex
assets.description: Black Sea grain export terminals. Grain corridor revenue stream supports long-term equity value. Strategic for Ukraine's agricultural export recovery and EU food security.
assets.source: RDNA3 transport chapter; KSE port assessment

assets.name: Metinvest Steel (Mariupol Rebuild)
assets.description: Post-war rebuild of Azovstal and Illich integrated steelworks. Export-grade steel production for European market. Equity co-investment with Metinvest and strategic industrial partners.

assets.name: Kyiv City District Residential Fund
assets.description: Large-scale multi-family residential rebuild in Saltivka and liberated Kyiv Oblast districts. Social housing equity vehicle modelled on Vienna Gemeindebau. Availability payments from municipal budget.
assets.co_investor_target: EIB Social Housing, BERD, municipal bonds
assets.source: RDNA3 housing chapter; Kyiv City recovery plan 2024

assets.name: Naftogaz Renewable Transition
assets.description: Conversion of Naftogaz infrastructure assets to renewable gas and hydrogen production. Green bond-eligible. EU taxonomy alignment unlocks blended finance from InvestEU-UA facility.
assets.co_investor_target: EIB Climate, EBRD Green Economy, EU4Energy

assets.name: Kharkiv–Dnipro Agro-Industrial Zone
assets.description: Liberated agricultural land and processing capacity across Kharkiv and Zaporizhzhia oblasts. Land bank equity vehicle with grain terminal integration. First beneficiary of EU agricultural reconstruction fund.
assets.source: RDNA3 agricultural chapter; KSE land assessment 2024

assets.name: National Telecom & Fibre Backbone
assets.description: Post-war fibre-to-the-premises rollout across liberated oblasts. Digital public goods vehicle. Revenue from service contracts; equity value from connectivity premium on rebuilt property values.
assets.co_investor_target: EBRD, EIF Digital, Kyivstar / Vodafone Ukraine
assets.source: EU Digital Ukraine strategy 2024; RDNA3 digital chapter
